session.user:
Run these commands in sequence and report ALL failures:
1. First run: ``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/unit/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -40 ```
2. If that passes, run: ``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/commands/ tests/core/ tests/packages/ tests/tui/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -60 ```
Report the complete output of each command. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run these pytest commands sequentially and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run unit tests with short traceback

session.assistant: The unit tests passed. Now running the second set of tests:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/commands/ tests/core/ tests/packages/ tests/tui/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -60
Run commands, core, packages, and tui tests

session.assistant:
**Summary of Test Results:**
1. **Unit tests (tests/unit/)**: PASSED - All 1,597 tests passed with no failures - Only minor deprecation warnings about Click
2. **Commands/Core/Packages/TUI tests**: FAILED - Error: `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'erk.tui.data.fake_provider'` - File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_app_runs.py:9` - The test file is trying to import `FakePlanDataProvider`, `make_plan_row`, and `make_run_row` from `erk.tui.data.fake_provider`, but this module does not exist
**Location of failure:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_app_runs.py` (line 9)
This is a missing module issue in the TUI test infrastructure that needs to be resolved before these test suites can run.
